description: CompositionBlue top made of knitted polyester blended fabric, has adjustable shoulder straps, floral lace on the front and top gathered to a broad panel at hemFitRegularWash careRinse seperatelyGentle hand wash in mild detergentDo not bleachDo not scrub on embroidery and printLine dry inside outIron lowIt’s time to explore and discover new styles and get ready for freshness and summer outdoors with sepia. Pair it with legging, stilletto sandals and long earrings.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
